meta.description: Shared mock fixture universe for every Acuity frontend surface. One coherent dataset: the entities the doctor app mutates are the entities the operator console lists. Illustrative bilingual (zh-Hant-HK + en-HK) mock data only; no real PII.

validation.message_en: Enter a valid HKID, e.g. A123456(7).

fields.source_span: 就診日期：2026 年 7 月 5 日
診斷：急性上呼吸道感染

validation.message_en: Use an ICD-10 code such as J06.9.
validation.message_zh: 請使用 ICD-10 編碼，例如 J06.9。
